path.description: The session identity. Going forward this is the bare session UUID; legacy manifests may carry an "opfs://sessions/<uuid>" prefix that is normalized to the UUID on read.

storageType.description: Where this session's files live. Defaults to "opfs" when omitted (the OPFS root). "native" means the files live directly in `nativePath`. Mirrors the `storageType` field on the session itself.

nativePath.description: Absolute directory holding this session's files. Required when storageType is "native"; one directory holds exactly one session.

aiProvider.description: Configuration of the OpenAI-compatible AI provider

AIProviderHeader.description: Additional HTTP header sent with AI provider requests

AIProviderSettings.description: Configuration for an OpenAI-compatible AI provider (Ollama, OpenAI, vLLM, etc.)

endpointUrl.description: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible server (e.g. http://localhost:11434)

model.description: The model identifier to use for chat completions
